meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to leverage the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to deliver high-end, professional SaaS solutions for clients.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates boilerplate by providing a pre-configured, scalable architecture optimized for AI-driven development. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate the scaffolding, deployment, and testing phases, allowing you to transition from basic prototypes to production-ready enterprise SaaS in a fraction of the traditional development time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at the same boilerplate code you wrote three months ago, watching your billable hours evaporate into mundane configuration tasks. The market is moving toward high-velocity AI-assisted shipping, yet your workflow remains tethered to legacy patterns that keep your projects basic and your margins thin.

It’s time to break orbit. The Antigravity project template isn't just a starter kit; it's an opinionated, high-octane engine designed to handle the heavy lifting of modern SaaS architecture. When you combine this with the precision of Claude Code, you stop being a code monkey and start operating as a high-leverage technical architect.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the core directory structure and environment variables to ensure architectural consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity production template with Next.js 14, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Domain-Specific Schemas
steps.description: Use AI to define your database models and types to ensure strict typing across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust Supabase schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with RLS policies and TypeScript interface generation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema and types'

steps.title: Implement AI-Assisted API Routes
steps.description: Build high-performance endpoints that leverage the template's built-in error handling and middleware.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a secure authenticated API route handler that interacts with the Supabase client using the Antigravity boilerplate pattern.

steps.title: Configure Automated Testing Hooks
steps.description: Integrate Playwright tests to validate your UI components before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of E2E tests for the authentication flow, ensuring edge cases like invalid tokens are handled gracefully.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup playwright and create auth tests'

steps.title: Deploy via Optimized CI/CD
steps.description: Configure the deployment pipeline to leverage Vercel or your preferred provider for instant global distribution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project and generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated deployment and preview environments.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure github actions deployment pipeline'

pro_tips: Always force type safety; use Claude Code to re-scan your schema whenever you modify your database to keep frontend types synced.
Leverage the Antigravity 'middleware' folder to handle global authorization logic, keeping your individual page components clean.
Use CLI aliases for your most common Claude Code commands to shave seconds off every interaction.
Never manually write boilerplate; if you find yourself typing the same pattern twice, prompt the AI to build a reusable component.
Adopt a 'feature-first' folder structure to ensure your project remains modular as your client's requirements scale.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, perform a code audit using Claude Code to identify performance bottlenecks and optimize your bundle size for production.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps that limit your growth. Master the tools that top-tier engineers use to command premium rates and ship faster. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
